security.csp: default-src 'self'; connect-src 'self' https://api.open-meteo.com https://geocoding-api.open-meteo.com https://ipapi.co https://api.rainviewer.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://tile.openstreetmap.org https://*.tile.openstreetmap.org https://tilecache.rainviewer.com; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'; font-src 'self' data:; script-src 'self'
